title: Data & Systems Analyst
description: Data & Systems Analyst for HR team. Technical role: own HR data, build reports/dashboards, design automation flows, develop data models. Python, SQL required. AI/vibe coding advantage. Not an HR role, will provide HR domain training. Reports to Group CHRO.
match_reasons: Strong Python and SQL|Data modelling and building solutions experience|Automation and AI tool building|Fits 1-3 years experience range
gaps: No HR domain experience|No compensation/benefits modelling|No specific HR systems experience
